message: refactor(abi): migrate glibc timestamp aliases to syscalls

files.patch:
@@ -172,16 +172,11 @@
         "functions": []
       },
       "glibc_internal_abi": {
-        "count": 8,
+        "count": 3,
         "functions": [
           "adjtime",
-          "futimes",
-          "lutimes",
           "sethostid",
-          "settimeofday",
-          "sysctl",
-          "utime",
-          "utimes"
+          "sysctl"
         ]
       },
       "io_internal_abi": {
@@ -301,7 +296,7 @@
         "note": "In-file test helpers now route through native ABI entrypoints, so the replacement guard sees no direct libc call-throughs."
       },
       "unistd_abi": {
-        "count": 21,
+        "count": 20,
         "functions": [
           "backtrace",
           "backtrace_symbols",
@@ -315,8 +310,7 @@
           "getaddrinfo",
           "getenv",
           "mknodat",
-          "realpath",
-          "utimensat"
+          "realpath"
         ]
       },
       "dlfcn_abi": {
@@ -329,7 +323,7 @@
         "note": "Legacy regex register allocation now uses the ABI allocator path instead of direct libc calloc/free."
       }
     },
-    "total_call_throughs": 221,
+    "total_call_throughs": 130,
     "note": "Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh."
   }
 }
